annual.zh: 继续进行年度低剂量CT (LDCT) 筛查。

6mo.zh: 建议 6 个月后进行低剂量CT复查。

3mo.zh: 建议 3 个月后进行低剂量CT复查。

biopsy.zh: 建议进行组织采样（活检）或手术切除。

pet_ct.zh: 建议进行 PET-CT 扫描或组织采样。

antibiotics.en: Consider antibiotics and follow-up LDCT in 1-3 months.
antibiotics.zh: 考虑抗生素治疗，并在 1-3 个月后复查低剂量CT。

surgical_rules.reason_en: Lesion < 1cm (T1a), sub-lobar resection is often sufficient for peripheral nodules.
surgical_rules.reason_zh: 病灶 < 1cm (T1a)，对于外周结节，亚肺叶切除通常足够。

surgical_rules.reason_en: Lesion 1-2cm (T1b), segmentectomy preferred if margins adequate, otherwise lobectomy.
surgical_rules.reason_zh: 病灶 1-2cm (T1b)，如切缘足够首选肺段切除，否则行肺叶切除。

surgical_rules.reason_en: Lesion 2-3cm (T1c), lobectomy is the standard of care.
surgical_rules.reason_zh: 病灶 2-3cm (T1c)，肺叶切除是标准治疗方案。

surgical_rules.type_zh: 肺叶切除加淋巴结清扫
surgical_rules.reason_en: Lesion > 3cm (T2+), standard lobectomy with systematic lymph node dissection.
surgical_rules.reason_zh: 病灶 > 3cm (T2+)，标准肺叶切除并系统性淋巴结清扫。
